body:
<!-- hive-mind:working-session-summary -->
## Working session summary

**Overall CI: `completed/success`** — every job green, including Build Package. Issue #659 is fully solved and verified end-to-end.

## Summary

PR #692 (**ready for review**, all CI green): https://github.com/link-assistant/formal-ai/pull/692

**What landed** — a CI gate that burns down hardcoded natural-language strings in `src/` (R379), in two clean commits on top of merged `main`:

1. **`ci(R379): add hardcoded-natural-language burn-down gate`**
   - `scripts/check-hardcoded-language.rs` (rust-script) — a char-level lexer that extracts string literals from every `src/**/*.rs` (skipping comments, char literals, handling raw strings and `\`-newline continuations) and applies a low-noise **sentence heuristic** (space + terminal `.`/`!`/`?` + ≥2 real words). Fails the build **two ways** so the debt can only shrink: any `src/` literal missing from the allowlist (new debt blocked) **and** any allowlist row whose literal no longer occurs (stale row must be pruned). Ships 9 inline `--test` unit tests.
   - `scripts/hardcoded-language-allowlist.txt` — sorted, tab-separated `<path>\t<text>` inventory seeded with today's debt.
   - Wired into the `release.yml` lint job, `CONTRIBUTING.md` local-checks, `docs/design/no-hardcoded-natural-language.md`, `REQUIREMENTS.md` (R379 → guarded), and a `changelog.d` fragment.

2. **`refactor(R379): migrate engine_responses fallbacks to seed`** — removed 8 duplicated English prose fallback constants from `src/engine_responses.rs` (they already existed for all 4 languages in `data/seed/multilingual-responses.lino`), replaced by a single `cached_response(cell, intent, language)` that reads only from the seed via `seed::response_for`. Regenerating the allowlist drops those 8 rows — a clean burn-down diff proving the loop.

**Acceptance criteria — all met and verified:**
- **(a)** Gate passes on-branch; inserting `"Sorry, I can't do that."` into `src/` fails it with a `::error file=…::` annotation (verified live, then reverted).
- **(b)** Allowlist committed, sorted, every row carries its file path.
- **(c)** CI job + `CONTRIBUTING.md` updated — the **"Check hardcoded natural language" lint step ran green in CI** (step 11).
- **(d)** Real entries (the 8 `engine_responses.rs` fallbacks) migrated to seed data in the same PR.

**Verification:** `cargo fmt --check` clean · `cargo clippy --all-targets --all-features` clean · `cargo test --test unit` 1547 passed / 0 failed · full test tree compiles post-merge · gate + 9 inline tests green · **all CI jobs `success`** on the final tip commit `b9b7bad5`.

One note: the repo's `detect-code-changes` gate diffs only the PR-head tip commit against its parent, so the initial push (tip = allowlist-only `.txt`) skipped the Lint/Test jobs. I rebased so the code-bearing migration is the tip commit, which correctly triggers Lint (with the new gate) and Test — both now confirmed green.

---

<!-- hive-mind:working-session-summary -->
## Working session summary

The working tree is now clean and everything is in order. Here's the summary:

## Resolution

The only outstanding item was the auto-generated `.gitkeep` placeholder file (created solely for PR creation, with header `# .gitkeep file auto-generated ... for PR creation`). It is **not part of the solution**, so I removed it. The working tree is now clean.

## Status of the actual work (issue #659 / PR #692)

The implementation was already complete on the branch in two commits:

1. **`ci(R379): add hardcoded-natural-language burn-down gate`** — adds `scripts/check-hardcoded-language.rs` (rust-script), the seeded `hardcoded-language-allowlist.txt`, CI wiring in `.github/workflows/release.yml`, and docs (`CONTRIBUTING.md`, design doc, `REQUIREMENTS.md`, changelog fragment).
2. **`refactor(R379): migrate engine_responses fallbacks to seed`** — the burn-down migration removing 8 allowlisted rows, proving the loop.

All acceptance criteria are met, and verification confirms:
- ✅ **CI is fully green** on the latest commit `b9b7bad5` (= HEAD) — Lint/Format, Test, Build, Coverage, E2E all pass; the "Check hardcoded natural language" gate ran green.
- ✅ Working tree is **clean** (no uncommitted changes).
- ✅ `origin/main` **is an ancestor** of the branch (main is merged in).
- ✅ PR #692 is **not a draft** and is **MERGEABLE**.

No push was needed — removing the untracked `.gitkeep` doesn't change any tracked content, and all committed work was already pushed and validated by CI.

PR: https://github.com/link-assistant/formal-ai/pull/692
